prompt:
Create a premium Japanese figure advertisement poster on a clean off-white background with subtle pale gray brushstroke textures and tiny scattered gold flecks. The layout should look like a luxury hobby product introduction page for an original anime/mecha statue. The main centerpiece is a highly detailed 1/7 scale-style figure of {argument name="character name" default="Samurai Mecha Girl"}, a slim teenage anime girl in a dramatic crouching attack pose, turned three-quarters to the viewer, with one knee bent under her body and the other mechanical leg planted forward. She raises a katana overhead with both hands as if about to strike. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur block. She has long brown hair with loose strands flying outward, a white headband with a small mechanical side ornament, and a navy Japanese sailor school uniform with a cropped long-sleeve top, red neckerchief, short pleated skirt, and exposed midriff. Her arms and legs are mostly robotic: metallic silver-gray mechanical arms with articulated fingers and visible joints, bulky armored mech thighs and calves with realistic pistons, seams, weathering, and small orange caution markings. The sword is a polished katana with a white-and-black wrapped handle and a metallic guard. Render the statue as a realistic painted collectible figure with studio lighting, glossy and matte material contrast, precise shadows, and showroom-grade product photography.

Design the page like a commercial figure brochure with exactly 5 numbered detail callout sections. On the left side, stack 4 rectangular close-up panels vertically, each with a number and Japanese label plus short descriptive body text in Japanese: panel 1 shows a close-up of the face and hair, labeled "01 表情"; panel 2 shows the upper torso and uniform, labeled "02 上半身"; panel 3 shows the raised mechanical arms and sword grip, labeled "03 メカアーム&ソード"; panel 4 shows the mechanical legs, labeled "04 メカレッグ". At the bottom right, add a wider rectangular panel labeled "05 武装・ディテール" showing exactly 2 katana close-up views arranged horizontally, one above the other. Keep all panel images bordered lightly and integrated into the poster layout.

At the upper left, place a large expressive brush-calligraphy title reading {argument name="main title" default="Samurai Mecha Girl"}, with an ink-brush circle motif behind the first word. At the upper right, add a gold minimalist logo and the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="TENNEN"}, with small Japanese tagline text beneath it. Along the right side, place a vertical Japanese promotional slogan in elegant dark text. In the lower left area, include small product specification text in Japanese with exactly these lines of product info styling: scale, product name, sculptor credit, paint credit, brand, and a release date line. Use {argument name="release date" default="2025年12月"} in the schedule area. Along the bottom, add a dark horizontal footer bar with the gold brand logo on the left, the brand name repeated, a short Japanese brand statement in small text across the center, and tiny legal/disclaimer text at the far right. Overall style: high-end Japanese figure marketing sheet, refined editorial composition, realistic collectible statue photography, elegant white-and-gold packaging aesthetic, anime girl fused with hard-surface mecha design, polished and premium.
translatedPrompt:
在干净的米白色背景上创作一张高端日式手办广告海报，背景带有微妙的浅灰色笔触纹理和零星的细小金箔点缀。排版应呈现出原创动漫/机甲雕像的高端兴趣产品介绍页风格。画面中心是一个高度精细的 1/7 比例风格手办 {argument name="character name" default="Samurai Mecha Girl"}，一位身材苗条的动漫少女正处于戏剧性的蹲姿攻击状态，身体侧向观众，一膝弯曲在身下，另一条机械腿向前跨出。她双手将武士刀高举过头顶，仿佛即将发动攻击。她的面部被一个柔和的方形模糊块刻意遮挡。她留着棕色长发，发丝凌乱飞舞，佩戴着带有小型机械侧饰的白色发带，身穿海军风日本水手校服，包括短款长袖上衣、红色领巾、短百褶裙，并露出腰部。她的四肢大部分为机械结构：金属银灰色机械手臂，手指关节清晰可见；厚重的装甲机甲大腿和小腿，带有逼真的活塞、接缝、风化效果和细小的橙色警示标志。手中的武士刀经过抛光处理，配有黑白缠绕的刀柄和金属刀镡。将雕像渲染为具有摄影棚灯光、亮面与哑光材质对比、精确阴影以及展厅级产品摄影效果的逼真涂装收藏品。

将页面设计成商业手办宣传册，包含 5 个带编号的细节标注区域。在左侧垂直堆叠 4 个长方形特写面板，每个面板配有编号、日文标签以及简短的日文描述文本：面板 1 展示面部和头发特写，标注为“01 表情”；面板 2 展示上半身和制服，标注为“02 上半身”；面板 3 展示抬起的机械手臂和握剑姿态，标注为“03 メカアーム&ソード”；面板 4 展示机械腿部，标注为“04 メカレッグ”。在右下角，添加一个更宽的长方形面板，标注为“05 武装・ディテール”，水平排列展示 2 个武士刀特写视图，上下叠放。所有面板图像均需带有轻微边框，并融入海报整体布局中。

在左上角放置一个富有表现力的书法大标题 {argument name="main title" default="Samurai Mecha Girl"}，第一个词后方带有水墨圆圈图案。在右上角添加一个金色极简 Logo 和品牌名称 {argument name="brand name" default="TENNEN"}，下方配有简短的日文标语。在右侧放置一条优雅的深色日文宣传口号。在左下角区域，包含简短的日文产品规格文本，严格按照以下产品信息样式：比例、产品名称、原型师、涂装师、品牌以及发布日期行。在排期区域使用 {argument name="release date" default="2025年12月"}。在底部添加一个深色水平页脚栏，左侧放置金色品牌 Logo，重复品牌名称，中间放置简短的日文品牌声明，最右侧放置极小的法律/免责声明文本。整体风格：高端日式手办营销页，精致的编辑排版，逼真的收藏级雕像摄影，优雅的白金包装美学，动漫少女与硬核机甲设计的融合，精致且高端。

breakdown.creativeCore: 武士机甲少女手办海报：一款日式高端原创动漫机甲少女手办产品海报，非常适合用于模拟收藏级手办广告及兴趣品牌展示排版。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, poster layout, callout, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, anime, minimalist, luxury, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
